scene.description: A quiet outdoor harbor in Yeosu at night, near Hamel Lighthouse and the Hamel Exhibition Hall, overlooking the open sea.
must_include: harbor edge or low stone wall
distant city lights reflected on water
open space above for thumbnail text

forbidden: seated or sitting pose for Sowoni
face visible from front or side
hair style or color change from shoulder-length dark hair

character.name: Sowoni
character.appearance: shoulder-length dark hair, slim body, back view or slight 3/4 back only, no facial detail
character.pose: standing only — never sitting, never crouching
character.description: Sowoni stands quietly at the harbor edge, facing the open sea, looking toward the single star in the sky.
character.rule: Sowoni is the emotional center. No mascot character. No star in hands.

composition.flow: Sowoni → harbor edge → sea → star in sky
